text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower has managed to leave quite a
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Nishino Flower and I visit the
racecourse to enjoy the special open day event
being held.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The food was delicious, wasn't it? There was such
a huge variety of dishes on offer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I normally just eat bentos, but it's nice to eat out
once in a while! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to thank me! I love making those
lunches!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I never knew the winds here could be like this.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...It's strange. This is the same turf I run on with
everything I have, but now I'm just strolling
casually along it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Even though it's the same place, the atmosphere
is completely different.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And I've never really thought about it before, but
the turf here is always so lush.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This racecourse made me who I am today. It's like
my second home! I love it here!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I'm going to keep growing even bigger. Why,
I'm sure I'll be taller than you someday, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, right? ♪
You know, I've realized something.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My small stature and inexperience are just proof
that I've got a lot of changing to do in the future.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So... Please watch over me as I transform into the
Umamusume I hope to become! ♪
